pr.title: 11L Int6 QAT + Per-Dim SmearGate + SWA: 1.1480 BPB (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Int6-aware 11-layer muon model employs per-dim SmearGate gating, SWA, and fp16 embedding passthrough for quant-friendly capacity under 16MB.
techniques: Per-dim SmearGate blends current and preceding embeddings with learned sigmoids for richer gating before quantization.
Int6 QAT with STE, per-row symmetric clipping, and fp16 tied embeddings keeps activations compressible while supporting int6-in-int8 artifacts.
SWA over the last half of training plus high muon weight decay smooths weights for better int6 fidelity.
